# Pressure Cascade Design: Engineering Principles for Maintaining Biosafety Containment

## 适用受众
CTO

## 写作角度说明
压差梯度是生物安全实验室的核心安全屏障。本角度深入分析压差设计的工程原理，帮助 CTO 理解为什么供应商的压差控制能力是技术实力的体现。

## 核心论点 / 洞察
The engineering discipline behind pressure cascade design—sensor placement, response time, redundancy architecture—reveals a supplier's depth in containment system fundamentals.

## 参考素材
- ISO 14644-1 differential pressure requirements: adjacent zones maintain ≥15Pa gradient
- Pressure sensor selection criteria: accuracy (±1Pa), response time, drift characteristics
- Cascade control algorithms: PI vs PID tuning, setpoint management during door cycles
- Differential pressure transmitter specifications: calibration requirements, measurement range
- Emergency scenarios: power failure mode, pressure loss alarming, automatic lockdown procedures

## 关键词
Pressure Cascade, Differential Pressure, ISO 14644-1, Containment, Sensor Accuracy, PID Control, Redundancy
